results.name: 1. Expert Loading Check
results.desc: Successfully loaded all 8 default experts with local trees and UCE models.

results.name: 2. Top-3 Keyword Soft Routing Check
results.desc: Successfully matched keyword-based intents and returned proper routing weight maps.

results.name: 3. Gateway Model Routing Fallback Check
results.desc: Evaluated gateway router forward pass. Returned 3 experts with normalized weights summing to 1. Top-3 experts: [python_coder, web_stack, rust_systems].

results.name: 4. Token Probability Blending Check
results.desc: Aggregated leaf probability matrices across experts using routing weights; normalized sum equals exactly 1.0.

results.name: 5. Local Autoregressive Generation Check
results.desc: Generated output text locally: "aaab" (length 4). Forward calls during loop: Python: 4, Web: 4, Rust: 4.
